Waterborne diseases remain a leading cause of death in areas without clean water access.
在缺乏清洁用水的地区 waterborne disease 仍然是主要的死亡原因。
Many cities lack the recycling infrastructure to cope with the volume of plastic waste produced.
许多城市缺乏应对产生的 plastic waste 数量的 recycling infrastructure。
Extreme weather events such as floods and heatwaves have become noticeably more frequent.
extreme weather event 如 flood 和 heatwave 已经明显变得更加 frequent。
Herd immunity protects those who cannot be vaccinated for genuine medical reasons.
herd immunity 保护因 genuine medical reason 无法接种疫苗的人。
The placebo effect demonstrates how powerful the mind-body connection can be in healing.
placebo effect 展示了 healing 中 mind-body connection 能有多么 powerful。
Investing in preventive care is far cheaper than treating advanced diseases later.
投资 preventive care 比 later 治疗 advanced disease 便宜得多。
Non-renewable resources once used up cannot be replaced within any human timescale.
non-renewable resource 一旦用完在任何 human timescale 内都无法替代。
Sea level rise poses an existential threat to low-lying island nations and coastal cities.
sea level rise 对 low-lying island nation 和 coastal city 构成 existential threat。
Companies face growing pressure to measure and reduce their environmental footprint.
公司面临越来越大的压力去 measure 和 reduce 其 environmental footprint。
Patient-centred care means involving patients in decisions about their own treatment.
patient-centred care 意味着让患者参与关于自己 treatment 的 decision。
The pharmaceutical industry spends billions on research and development each year.
pharmaceutical industry 每年在 research and development 上花费数十亿。
The surgical procedure normally takes about two hours and patients go home the same day.
surgical procedure 通常需要大约两小时患者当天就能回家。
Many economists argue fossil fuel subsidies should be redirected to renewable energy.
许多 economist 认为 fossil fuel subsidy 应转向 renewable energy。
The island has exceeded its carrying capacity leading to water and resource shortages.
该岛已超过其 carrying capacity 导致 water 和 resource shortage。
The precautionary principle says we should limit harmful activities even without full proof.
precautionary principle 认为即使没有充分 proof 也应限制 harmful activity。
Effective classroom management is one of the biggest challenges facing new teachers.
effective classroom management 是新 teacher 面临的最大 challenge 之一。
Inclusive education means all children learn together regardless of their abilities.
inclusive education 意味着所有儿童无论能力如何都能一起学习。
Adult literacy programmes improve employment prospects and overall quality of life.
adult literacy programme 改善了 employment prospect 和 overall quality of life。
Investing in teacher training is among the most effective ways to raise educational standards.
投资 teacher training 是提高 educational standard 的最 effective 方法之一。
Teachers should be involved in curriculum development not just delivering ready-made content.
teacher 应参与 curriculum development 而不仅仅是 deliver ready-made content。
